recommendations.title: College
recommendations.overview: A bookish college student dismissive of athletics is compelled to try out sports to win the affection of the girl he loves.

recommendations.title: Way Out West
recommendations.overview: Stan and Ollie try to deliver the deed to a valuable gold mine to the daughter of a dead prospector. Unfortunately, the daughter's evil guardian is determined to have the gold mine for himself and his saloon-singer wife.

recommendations.title: Big Business
recommendations.overview: Stan and Ollie play door-to-door Christmas tree salesmen in California. They end up getting into an escalating feud with grumpy would-be customer James Finlayson, with his home and their car being destroyed in the melee.

recommendations.title: Witchboard
recommendations.overview: Playing around with a Ouija board, a trio of friends succeeds in contacting the spirit of a young boy. Trouble begins when the evil spirit, Malfeitor, takes over one of their bodies.

recommendations.title: American Satan
recommendations.overview: A young rock band, half from England and half from the US, drop out of college and move to the Sunset Strip to chase their dreams.

recommendations.title: Benji
recommendations.overview: Two school kids strike up a friendship with an orphaned puppy named Benji. When danger befalls them and they end up kidnapped by robbers who are in over their heads, Benji and his scruffy sidekick come to the rescue.

recommendations.title: Joe Dirt 2: Beautiful Loser
recommendations.overview: When happy family man Joe Dirt finds himself transported to the recent past, he begins an epic journey to get back to his loved ones in the present.

recommendations.title: Troop Zero
recommendations.overview: In rural 1977 Georgia, a misfit girl dreams of life in outer space. When a national competition offers her a chance at her dream, to be recorded on NASA’s Golden Record, she recruits a makeshift troupe of Birdie Scouts, forging friendships that last

recommendations.title: Girlfriend's Day
recommendations.overview: When he's caught up in a deadly conspiracy, an unemployed greeting card writer must create the perfect card for a new holiday to save his skin.

recommendations.title: The Forever Purge
recommendations.overview: All the rules are broken as a sect of lawless marauders decides that the annual Purge does not stop at daybreak and instead should never end as they chase a group of immigrants who they want to punish because of their harsh historical past.
